tagline: A second-generation Santa Rosa builder with skilled crews and fair pricing.
seoDescription: Scott Larson Construction is a CSLB-licensed, second-generation general contractor in Santa Rosa — custom building, remodels, additions, and flooring across Sonoma County, with a BuildZoom score in the top 16% of California contractors.
heroSubheading: Scott Larson Construction brings skilled, licensed crews and honest pricing to custom homes, remodels, and additions across Sonoma County — the kind of contractor neighbors actually recommend.
highlights: CSLB-licensed General Building contractor — licensed & insured
BuildZoom score of 98 — top 16% of California contractors
Custom building, remodels, additions, renovation & flooring
Serving Santa Rosa and Sonoma County
aboutHeading: Built by people who do the work
aboutBody: Scott Larson Construction is a second-generation general contractor based in Santa Rosa, serving homeowners throughout Sonoma County. Scott runs licensed, skilled crews and is known locally for doing quality work at reasonable prices — the reason so much of the business comes by word of mouth.

From custom homes and whole-home remodels to room additions, renovations, and flooring, the company holds a CSLB General Building license along with renovation and flooring classifications. An independent BuildZoom score of 98 places Scott Larson Construction in the top 16% of California licensed contractors.

services.title: Custom Home Building
services.description: Ground-up residential construction managed by an owner who's on the job, not just on the paperwork.

services.title: Whole-Home Remodels
services.description: Thoughtful remodels that respect what works in your home and rebuild what doesn't.

services.title: Room Additions
services.description: Additions that add real, livable space and blend seamlessly with the existing house.

services.title: Renovations
services.description: Renovation work that brings older Sonoma County homes up to today's standards.

services.title: Flooring & Floor Covering
services.description: Flooring and floor-covering installation as a licensed specialty, not a subbed afterthought.

services.title: Repairs & Improvements
services.description: Smaller projects handled with the same skilled crews and fair pricing as the big ones.

testimonials.quote: Scott Larson is a great contractor. He does great work at reasonable prices, his workers are skilled, and he's fully licensed and insured.
testimonials.author: Verified review · Santa Rosa

notes: VERIFIED 2026-06-29 from Yelp, BuildZoom (score 98, top 16% CA), Nextdoor, Facebook, D&B, CSLB references. Owner: Scott Larson (second/third-generation contractor). Phone (707) 526-6899 (primary current listing; an older listing shows (707) 477-1460). Email Scottlarsonconst@sbcglobal.net (owner-direct). Address 4779 Ponderosa Dr, Santa Rosa. Licenses: General Building, Renovation, Flooring/Floor Covering. NO dedicated website — presence is Yelp/Facebook/Instagram/directories only (weak-site bar PASSED). Testimonial paraphrases a real, repeated Yelp/Nextdoor sentiment about his work, pricing, skilled crews, and licensing; attributed generically as a verified review. Founding year not precisely verified — established omitted.
